message:
feat(fp-frame): str.extractall named-group column parity (frankenpandas-6f3f)

extractall previously numbered all output columns positionally as
`0, 1, ...`. Now it consults `Regex::capture_names` and uses named
groups (`(?P<name>...)` / `(?<name>...)`) as column names, matching
pandas 2.2 Series.str.extractall. Unnamed groups keep their positional
index; a defensive dedup suffix guards against duplicate proposed
names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
